events.text: Wrote the compliance assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Verdict: **fail** — frayed/burned webbing on fall protection equipment is a critical, non-compliant defect requiring immediate removal from service under OSHA 1926.502(d) and 1910.140(c)(4), which mandate pre-use inspection and removal of equipment damaged by cuts, abrasion, or heat exposure.
